name: linkedin_jobs_scraper
title: LinkedIn Jobs Scraper
description: Scrape public LinkedIn jobs search result cards from a copied jobs search URL or from keywords and location, including title, company, location, job URL, logo, listed date, and visible benefits text.

seo.title: LinkedIn Jobs Scraper Tool for Public Job Search Results
seo.description: Scrape public LinkedIn jobs search result cards with Better Fetch, including job title, company, company URL, location, job URL, logo, listed date, and visible benefits text.
seo.intro: LinkedIn Jobs Scraper gives agents and recruiting workflows a practical public-job-search primitive. Provide a LinkedIn jobs search URL, or a keyword and location pair, and the tool reads LinkedIn's logged-out guest results page before returning clean job cards that can feed hiring research, lead routing, market maps, or daily job monitors.

useCases.title: Hiring market scans
useCases.description: Collect current public LinkedIn job listings by keyword and location to map demand, active employers, locations, and role titles.

useCases.title: Recruiting lead lists
useCases.description: Turn LinkedIn search results into structured company and job URLs for sourcing, enrichment, outreach planning, or CRM import.

useCases.title: Daily job monitors
useCases.description: Schedule saved LinkedIn job searches and compare new result cards over time without using private LinkedIn credentials.

faqs.question: Does LinkedIn Jobs Scraper require LinkedIn login cookies?
faqs.answer: No. Version 0.1 reads the public guest jobs search page and does not use LinkedIn passwords, exported sessions, private cookies, or private API tokens.

faqs.question: Can I paste a LinkedIn jobs search URL?
faqs.answer: Yes. Paste a public LinkedIn jobs search URL to preserve LinkedIn's own filters, or provide keywords and location and let the tool build the search URL.

faqs.question: Does this version return full job descriptions?
faqs.answer: No. Version 0.1 returns search result cards. Full job descriptions, recruiter profiles, company enrichment, and logged-in filters should be added as separate validated tool slices.

search_url.description: Public LinkedIn jobs search URL. Use this or provide keywords.

keywords.description: Job search keywords when search_url is not provided.

location.description: LinkedIn job search location when search_url is not provided.

date_posted.description: Optional LinkedIn date filter when building a search URL.

company_id.description: Optional LinkedIn company id filter when building a search URL.

total_results_label.description: Visible result count label when LinkedIn exposes it

jobs.description: Public LinkedIn job result cards in result order

listed_at.description: ISO date from the result card
